description:
**Milestone:** Calendar UI

Allow users to create and delete custom calendar events from the UI.

1. **apps/ui/src/components/views/calendar-view/create-event-dialog.tsx**: Dialog opened from a '+' button or by clicking an empty day. Form fields: title (required), date (pre-filled from clicked day), endDate (optional), description (optional), color (color picker with 8 preset options). Submit calls POST /api/calendar/create. On success, closes dialog and refreshes events.

2. **apps/ui/src/components/views/calendar-view/calendar-view.tsx**: Add a floating action button (bottom-right) to open the create-event-dialog. Also add a delete option in the event popover for custom events (not for feature/milestone events).

3. **apps/ui/src/components/views/calendar-view/calendar-header.tsx** (optional, extract from calendar-view if it gets large): Month/year title with prev/next navigation arrows and a 'Today' button that resets to current month.

**Files to Modify:**
- apps/ui/src/components/views/calendar-view/create-event-dialog.tsx
- apps/ui/src/components/views/calendar-view/calendar-view.tsx
- apps/ui/src/components/views/calendar-view/calendar-header.tsx

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Clicking '+' or empty day opens create event dialog
- [ ] Created events appear on the calendar without page refresh
- [ ] Custom events can be deleted from the day popover
- [ ] Feature and milestone events cannot be deleted from the calendar (they must be updated at source)
- [ ] 'Today' button resets view to current month

**Complexity:** medium
title: Custom event creation and management UI
